title: BIS Project Agorá shows tokenized payments can settle in seconds
summary: BIS Project Agorá shows tokenized payments can settle in seconds
briefing: The Bank for International Settlements' collaboration with seven central banks and more than 40 institutions concludes a two-year project with a prototype settling wholesale payments in seconds.

summary: Crypto liquidations hit $935M as Bitcoin price dips to $72.6K
briefing: Over $935 million was wiped out across the crypto market as traders shifted their focus to $70,000 as the last line of defense for Bitcoin.

title: Crypto companies have tightened compliance, but gaps remain: Chainalysis
summary: Crypto companies have tightened compliance, but gaps remain: Chainalysis
briefing: Around 47% of crypto organizations onboarded in 2026 are operating at alerting standards that would have ranked among the industry’s strictest five years ago.

title: Crypto markets shed $80B after fresh US strikes on Iran
summary: Crypto markets shed $80B after fresh US strikes on Iran
briefing: The crypto market capitalization has fallen to its lowest level since mid-April after the US carried out strikes on Iran for the second time in three days amid peace talks.

title: CFTC seeks to reverse settlement deal with Gemini
summary: CFTC seeks to reverse settlement deal with Gemini
briefing: The CFTC claimed that its settled complaint filed under the Biden administration relied heavily on a whistleblower’s allegations that Gemini inflated trading activity to distort user demand.

summary: Bitcoin funding spike shows longs defending $70K: Will ETF outflows reverse bulls’ efforts?
briefing: Bitcoin dropped closer to a critical support level as spot and long futures traders’ efforts to hold $75,000 failed. Is sub-$70,000 BTC next?

summary: US charges Google employee with insider trading bets on Polymarket
briefing: The Justice Department and the CFTC allege that Google software engineer Michele Spagnuolo profited $1.2 million on Polymarket after accessing non-public information at work.

summary: Kraken rolls out Bitcoin vault product for holders to earn yield
briefing: Within the first 10 hours of launch, the Kraken Earn BTC Vault raked in $30 million worth of Bitcoin deposits from 4,000 unique wallets.

summary: CFTC, Gemini File Joint Motion to Reverse $5M Settlement

title: AI Chatbots Could Quietly Pull Users Away From Reality, Researchers Warn
summary: AI Chatbots Could Quietly Pull Users Away From Reality, Researchers Warn
briefing: Researchers warn that prolonged chatbot interactions could distort how some users experience reality and social connection.

summary: Here's How Much Bitcoin Elon Musk Would Control If SpaceX and Tesla Merge
briefing: If Tesla and SpaceX merged—as is a reported possibility—then Elon Musk's combined entity would hold billions of dollars' worth of Bitcoin.

summary: Ethereum Traders Grow Increasingly Bearish as ETFs Bleed, ETH Sinks Near $2,000

summary: Marvel Comics Icon Stan Lee Has Been 'Revived' With AI Tech—Again
